title: Ootsuchi Chou Kagura Dai Hammer
titleNative: 大槌超神楽ダイハンマー
synopsis: Mitora Ootsuchi, who belongs to the tourism department of Ootsuchi Town Hall, is doing a rehearsal with other staff to promote the town. While touring various spots, such as the Gensui River and Kozuchi Shrine, a demon beast suddenly attacks. Ootsuchi and her friends are now faced with saving the town. (Source: YouTube)

title: Ootsuchi Kai Monogatari
synopsis: Follows the daily life of Kai Ootsuchi, the image character of Ootsuchi Station on the Sanriku Railway, living in the town and working day and night. (Source: Official site)

title: Choujun! Choujou Senpai
synopsis: In Chinjuku, the city that never sleeps, there is a psychic senior police officer who has powers beyond human comprehension! His name is Meguru Chojo! Along with his judo expert partner Nao Ippongi, this hilarious duo will keep the streets clean by any means necessary!

tags.name: Police
tags.description: Centers around the life and activities of law enforcement officers.

title: Let's Go Kaikigumi
synopsis: The horror comedy manga begins one fateful day when the cowardly (unnamed) protagonist meets Mechako, the leader of the "Kaikigumi" organization which is in charge of the ghosts and supernatural creatures scaring humans. The protagonist somehow takes part in the revival of the Kaikigumi, after which one bizarre (yet not scary) phenomenon after another crops up around him. (Source: ANN)

synopsis: Educational videos aimed at children aged from 1 to 6, which uses songs and other fun activities to help children learn empathy, manners, languages, and life skills.

title: Anila to Cocora
synopsis: The anime centers on sea otter brothers Anira and Kokora, who live at a certain aquarium. Anira is the older brother who is cool, but also has a naive side. The younger brother Kokora is a passionate otter who adores his older brother. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Tetsuryou! meet with Tetsudou Musume
titleNative: てつりょー！meet with 鉄道むすめ
synopsis: "I want to escape my daily routine and go on a trip somewhere." I've thought that many times. Days when I don't even know what I want to be in the future. But someday, I want to find something I can get really into. As the campus was buzzing with excitement at the start of a new day, the members of the Railway Travel Club (commonly known as the Tetsuryou-kai) reached out to Misaki. As the world spreads out through the tracks, her heart begins to beat faster! As the Tetsudou Musume (Railway Girls) celebrate their 20th anniversary, the Tetsuryou-kai travels their world in search of excitement. (Source: Official Site, translated)

title: Uchi no 3 Shimai Movie
titleNative: えいが うちの3姉妹
synopsis: "An animated version of a super child-rearing essay blog. The cute three sisters Fuu, Suu, and Chii, along with their mom and dad, have a lot of interesting things going on in their "happy-go-lucky" daily lives." (Source: Official Website)

title: Hoshi X kara no Rakko
synopsis: Currently, there are only three sea otters in Japan. In fact, one of them is an alien who was stranded on Earth and disguised himself to hide. Various marine creatures come to consult with this highly intelligent sea otter-like alien every day. (Source: YouTube, translated)

title: Neko Konogoro: Tenka Toitsu-hen
titleNative: ネコこのゴロ～天下統一編～
synopsis: Follows Nekotarou, a cat from Kagoshima who aims to unify the country. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Ganbare! Chrome
synopsis: A series of short videos from Google Japan to promote the Chrome web browser. It features the Chrome mascot explaining various features of the browser that are based upon the winning artwork submissions from a competition they held earlier in the year.

title: Nan Hong
synopsis: When Wen Yifan returned to her hometown for work, she unexpectedly ran into the rumored "First-Class Handsome Guy" at a bar. However, she soon discovered that he was Sang Yan, someone she had hurt and rejected in high school. In a twist of fate, these two individuals who could never get along found themselves constantly crossing paths. They even ended up renting the same unit by chance and becoming housemates. With unspoken feelings buried deep within, strong emotions begin to stir... Let's see how Sang Yan, the "Peak Ideal Boyfriend," interprets and expresses his profound affection and sweet love! (Source: INKR)

synopsis: We follow the daily life of Li Chang Geng, an immortal who has to deal with high-pressure situations at work as best he can.

title: Bai She 3: Fusheng
synopsis: Xiaobai finally found Xu Xian, the reincarnation of Axuan, after 500 years, the two met on the Broken Bridge. Xiaobai and sister hid in the streets and alleys, started a lively life in human world with him and his brother-in-law Li Gongfu.

title: Crowned in a Hundred Days
synopsis: One second the restaurant was filled with joy, the next it was a river of blood… The king, who clearly loved his people, suddenly became a bloodthirsty beast… "Ming" has lost everyone he cared about; this terrible king is truly awful! I will take my revenge! Wait, you mean the soul in front of me with only 100 days left to live is the real "Lie"? Alright, alright! 100 days—let's both be crowned kings together! (Source: Bilibili, translated)
